title: Concurrent Process Flow in Software Engineering
description: A flowchart illustrating how multiple software development activities (like modeling, construction, and deployment) can overlap and execute concurrently within a single project iteration, rather than sequentially.
relationships: Modeling starts first but does not need to finish before Construction begins
Construction starts during Modeling and continues after it ends
Deployment starts during Construction and continues after it ends
All activities occur within a single iterative timebox
